title: hartogia elata
intro: Hartogia elata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the forest rubi. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hartogia elata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of various infections and diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
